title: Stone Calendar
description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic activates at the end of turn 7, dealing 52 damage to all enemies. The relic's display counter shows the current turn number until the damage turn is reached. After combat ends, the relic returns to normal status.
